creator: rafan@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Thomas,

I don't think it is a good idea to use GCC 2.95 to unbreak it.
In addition, it seems that the author stops developing since 3
years ago (from sscx.sf.net). 

Could you investigate if we can fix for newer GCC? Otherwise,
I think we leave this port as is.

Regards,
Rong-En Fan
